prices.source_phrase: Salem residents receive free general admission and a discount on Dual-Level memberships.
prices.source_block:
Is there a discount for Salem residents?

Yes, Salem residents receive free general admission and a discount on Dual-Level memberships.

reservation.source_phrase: All permanent exhibitions, including most special exhibitions, are included in your general admission ticket. Yin Yu Tang: A Chinese Home is also included in the general admission price but requires a separate timed reservation.
reservation.source_block:
What is included in general admission?

All permanent exhibitions, including most special exhibitions, are included in your general admission ticket. Yin Yu Tang: A Chinese Home is also included in the general admission price but requires a separate timed reservation. PEM's Ropes Mansion is open seasonally on weekends for self-guided tours. Timed reservations are required.

hours.source_phrase: The museum is open Thursdays through Mondays, 10 am–5 pm.
